purpose: Visual quality review of the RGB-only Ground Truth inspection set; it is not a Gaussian label artifact.

views.note: The green gift box and its front face are clear.
The reconstruction is washed out; it cannot support ownership labels.
The box side is clear and spatially separated from the desk.
The box is visible, but the clothes-rack pole occludes a narrow region.
The top and handle are visible, while the desk occludes part of the silhouette.
Severe reconstruction collapse prevents reliable ownership labels.
The front and side faces are clear.

annotation_rule: Only usable or partial views may provide target evidence. Insufficient views remain neutral and must not become negative evidence.
